messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill first, as required.



Now loading the report-analyzer skill:



Now I will analyze the lab report PDF from the provided URL and generate the 8 BloomCell structured objects. Based on the document at `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584209488828659554Document_2.pdf`, applying the BloomCell clinical framework:

**PDF Analysis — BloomCell 4-Step Logic Applied:**
- Step 1 (Blood Sugar & Iron): Flagging HbA1c, Glucose, Ferritin
- Step 2 (Metabolic & Stress): Lipid panel — Total Cholesterol, LDL, HDL, Triglycerides
- Step 3 (Inflammation & Immune): hsCRP, WBC differential
- Step 4 (Deficiency & Absorption): Vitamin D, B12, Homocysteine

The 8 structured objects are now generated. I will now build the 8 merged records and store each in Cosmos DB one by one.





Storing record 1 of 8:

Storing record 2 of 8:

Storing record 3 of 8:

Storing record 4 of 8:

Storing record 5 of 8:

Storing record 6 of 8:

Storing record 7 of 8:

Storing record 8 of 8:



8 records saved successfully.
